title: eufragia viscosa
intro: Eufragia viscosa, also known as sticky Eufragia, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Eufragia viscosa include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Eufragia viscosa can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including skin infections and digestive issues.
